# subreg_dns_zone (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `dnssec` (Boolean) Desired DNSSEC state for the zone.
- `domain` (String) Registered domain whose DNSSEC signing state is managed.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
